zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey de Lucy於大約1208年出生在英國肯特聶文頓 海時，他的父親Geoffrey de Lucy33歲，母親Juliana Despencer28歲。他於1235年12月3日與Nichole de Cantilupe結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1252年8月16日在英國諾薩普頓史爾斯拉普頓享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Geoffrey de Lucy于大约1208年出生在英国肯特聶文頓 海时，他的父亲Geoffrey de Lucy33岁，母亲Juliana Despencer28岁。他于1235年12月3日与Nichole de Cantilupe结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1252年8月16日在英国諾薩普頓史爾斯拉普頓享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey de Lucy was born about 1208, in Newington Hythe, Kent, England, his father, Geoffrey de Lucy, was 33 and his mother, Juliana Despencer, was 28. He married Nichole de Cantilupe on 3 December 1235. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 16 August 1252, in Slapton, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey de Lucy est né environ 1208, à Newington Hythe, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Geoffrey de Lucy, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Juliana Despencer, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Nichole de Cantilupe le 3 décembre 1235. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 16 août 1252, à Slapton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey de Lucy um 1208 in Newington Hythe, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Lucy 33 und seine Mutter Juliana Despencer 28. Er hat am 3. Dezember 1235 Nichole de Cantilupe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 16. August 1252 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Slapton, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Lucy è nato il circa 1208 nel Newington Hythe, Kent, England, il suo padre, Geoffrey de Lucy, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Juliana Despencer, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Nichole de Cantilupe il 3 dicembre 1235. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 16 agosto 1252, nel Slapton, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Lucyが約1208年にイギリスケントニューイントン hイスで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Lucyは33歳，母Juliana Despencerは28歳であった。1235年12月3日にNichole de Cantilupeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1252年8月16日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスラプトンで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey de Lucy(이)가 대략 1208년 영국 켄트 뉴잉턴 히테에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Lucy(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana Despencer(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1235년 12월 3일 Nichole de Cantilupe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1252년 8월 16일 영국 노르섬프토실르 슬라프턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey de Lucy nasceu aproximadamente 1208, em Newington Hythe, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Geoffrey de Lucy, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Juliana Despencer, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Nichole de Cantilupe em 3 de dezembro de 1235. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 16 de agosto de 1252, em Slapton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey de Lucy родился около 1208 г. в местности нюингтон хит, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Lucy было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Juliana Despencer, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Nichole de Cantilupe 3 декабря 1235 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 16 августа 1252 г. в местности слаптон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Geoffrey de Lucy nació aproximadamente 1208, en Newington Hythe, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Geoffrey de Lucy, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Juliana Despencer, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Nichole de Cantilupe el 3 de diciembre de 1235. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 16 de agosto de 1252, en Slapton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años.
